tasks.title: Run all project tests and identify failures
tasks.description: Execute the complete test suite using 'npm test' or 'npx vitest run'. Report all test results including which tests pass and which fail. For any failures, capture the full error messages and stack traces.
acceptance_criteria: Test results are reported with pass/fail status
Any failures include error messages and stack traces

tasks.title: Fix all failing tests
tasks.description: Based on the test failures identified in QA-001, fix all failing tests. Read the failing test files (in src/components/, src/pages/, src/sections/) and their corresponding source files. Common issues to check: missing imports, incorrect component props, outdated test assertions, DOM query mismatches. Update either the test files or source code as needed to make tests pass. Do not modify working tests.
acceptance_criteria: All identified test failures are addressed
Test fixes maintain test validity and coverage
Source code changes (if any) preserve existing functionality

tasks.title: Verify all tests pass
tasks.description: Run the complete test suite again using 'npm test' or 'npx vitest run' to verify all tests now pass. Confirm zero test failures and report final test results.
acceptance_criteria: All tests pass with zero failures
Final test report shows 100% pass rate
